hooks.bash: python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin) if not sys.stdin.isatty() else {};cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command','');lc=cmd.lower();('sync_agent_configs.py' in lc and print('[GUARD] High-impact script detected. Human approval required.'));('port_workspace_safety_config.py' in lc and print('[GUARD] port_workspace_safety_config.py - requires approved plan and explicit confirmation.'))" || exit 0

python3 -c "import subprocess,sys,shutil; _g=shutil.which('git'); _r=subprocess.run([_g,'status','--short'],capture_output=True,text=True) if _g else None; _c=(_r.stdout if (_r and not _r.returncode) else ''); _roots=('.agents/','.cursor/','.claude/','.codex/','.gemini/'); [print(m) for m in ['[USAGE-LOG] Governance files modified - update .agents/reports/usage/ entry'] if any(r in _c for r in _roots)]; sys.exit(0)"
